spec.expr: sort_desc(avg_over_time((sum by (integration)($alert_groups_resolution_time_seconds_sum{slug=~"$instance", team=~"$team", integration=~"$integration", service_name=~"$service_name"}) / sum by (integration)($alert_groups_resolution_time_seconds_count{slug=~"$instance", team=~"$team", integration=~"$integration", service_name=~"$service_name"}))[$__range:]))

spec.title: Mean time to resolve (MTTR) by Integration

spec.expr: sort_desc(avg_over_time((sum by(team) ($alert_groups_resolution_time_seconds_sum{slug=~"$instance", team=~"$team", integration=~"$integration", service_name=~"$service_name"}) / sum by(team)($alert_groups_resolution_time_seconds_count{slug=~"$instance", team=~"$team", integration=~"$integration", service_name=~"$service_name"}))[$__range:]))

spec.title: Mean time to resolve (MTTR) by Team

spec.description: Mean time between the start and first action of all alert groups for the last 7 days
spec.title: Average Mean time to resolve (MTTR)

spec.expr: avg(sum($alert_groups_resolution_time_seconds_sum{slug=~"$instance", team=~"$team", integration=~"$integration", service_name=~"$service_name"}) / sum($alert_groups_resolution_time_seconds_count{slug=~"$instance", team=~"$team", integration=~"$integration", service_name=~"$service_name"}))

options.content:
📣 This is a read-only dashboard. To make a copy, click "Settings" and "Save as".

📝 If you see *"No data"* errors, check the right datasource is selected
and that you have already used and setup the [IRM](/a/grafana-irm-app/alert-groups) plugin.
You can also try [re-importing the dashboard](/plugins/grafana-irm-app?page=dashboards)
to confirm you have the latest updates. If you just copied the dashboard,
you may need to reload it.
